# bits&bytes Kolkata

> Teen-led builders club in Kolkata, West Bengal, India.
> A city-fork of the bits&bytes™ network, run entirely by students.
> Website: https://gobitsnbytes.org · Email: kolkata@gobitsnbytes.org

## What We Are
bits&bytes Kolkata is for high-agency teen builders who want to ship real things — not attend lectures. We run hackathons, build nights, and workshops for students aged 13–19. Fully student-led, always free to join.

The Kolkata fork is led by Shoryavardhaan Gupta (Fork Lead), with co-founders from the broader bits&bytes network lending technical and creative direction.

## Quick Facts
- Members: 1500+ across India
- Projects shipped: 130+
- Partners: 100+
- Age range: 13–19
- Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India
- Cost: Free

## What We Do
- **Hackathons** — High-stakes competitions. Real prizes, real judges, 48-hour sprints.
- **Build Nights** — Show up with an idea, leave with a deployed URL.
- **Workshops** — Technical sessions by engineers in the field, hands-on from minute one.
- **Community** — 1500+ builders on Discord, year-round collaboration and peer accountability.

## Events
- **India Innovates 2026** (Mar 28, 2026 · Bharat Mandapam, New Delhi) — National youth innovation summit. 1.26 crore+ applicants, 15 finalist teams. bits&bytes served as Official Executive Partner. Press: New Delhi Times, Tribune India, Daily Excelsior.
- **Lucknow Build Guild** (Apr 19, 2026 · Lucknow) — Free hardware workshop and builder meetup.
- **GitHub Copilot Dev Day** (2025 · Kolkata) — Community event on AI-assisted coding. Maryam's campaign drove 10k+ impressions.
- **Execron 1.0** (2025 · IIT Kanpur) — AI hackathon where members competed in a 24-hour sprint.
- **ByteForge** (2025 · Kolkata) — Flagship build night. Every team walked out with something deployed.

## Team

**Fork Lead**
- Shoryavardhaan Gupta — Founded bits&bytes Kolkata. Driving Kolkata's identity as a hub for high-agency teen builders.

**Co-Founders (bits&bytes network)**
- Yash Singh — Organisation Lead. VS Code extension creator, IOQM qualifier, Scrapyard Kolkata lead organizer. yashvibe.codes
- Aadrika Maurya — Chief Creative Strategist. RSI India alumni, neuroscience researcher, owns brand and visual identity.
- Akshat Kushwaha — Technical Lead. Built the entire stack. AI/LLMOps specialist, production systems at scale. a3ro.dev

**Core Team**
- Devaansh Pathak — Founding Member & Backend Lead
- Maryam Fatima — Social Media & Promotions Head
- Sristhi Singh — Operations & Communications Head

**Contributors**
- Vaibhav Thakkar — Ops & Creative
- Atharva Upadhyay — Ops Lead, Kolkata Fork

## How to Join
Two tracks — both free:
1. **Community member** — Join the Discord, attend events, build things. No application, open to any teen.
2. **Working team** — Help organize and run the fork. Selective, requires an application.
Apply at: https://gobitsnbytes.org/join

## Contact & Socials
- **Email:** kolkata@gobitsnbytes.org
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/gobitsnbytes-kol — open source projects and code
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/gobitsnbytes.kolkata — events, behind the scenes, community moments
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/gobitsbytes — professional updates and news
- **Discord:** active community server (link via /join)

## Website Pages
- **/** — Homepage. Hero with Kolkata identity, manifesto quote, focus areas (hackathons/build nights/workshops/AI/community), impact stats (1500+ members, 130+ projects, 100+ partners), sponsor/partner slots, voices carousel from the team, join CTA.
- **/about** — Team profiles (Fork Lead + co-founders + core team + contributors), origin story across 4 chapters, dark CTA to join.
- **/events** — Full archive of all events with gallery photos, press links, and descriptions. Filterable by type.
- **/join** — Two tracks: community member (open, no application) and working team (selective). FAQs, expectations, sponsor section.
- **/coc** — Code of Conduct. Values, what's not allowed, three-strike accountability system, how to report.
- **/contact** — Email and all social links.
- **/fork** — Redirects to the bits&bytes Fork Network info page (Notion).
- **/join-cohort** — Redirects to the cohort join form (Notion).

## Code of Conduct (Summary)
Be warm, patient, and respectful. Zero tolerance for harassment, bullying, or doxxing. Three-strike system: warning → temp ban → permanent removal. Report to kolkata@gobitsnbytes.org — 100% confidential.

---
Last updated: June 2026
